author: NewsBreak Original
text:
By Parker Johnson ,
40 minutes ago The announcements just keep coming in the Kelce family.
Kylie Kelce's Instagram post on Friday night revealed a major piece of personal news that she and her husband, former Philadelphia Eagles center Jason Kelce, have been keeping under wraps.
It's understandable why Kylie, 32, and Jason, 37, were holding off on breaking the big news, since they have had plenty going on in the past few days alone.
On Thursday night, Jason went on "Jimmy Kimmel Live" to announce his new late night talk show on ESPN, “They Call It Late Night with Jason Kelce,” and had to deal with a heckling fan right after leaving the studio.
Former NFL player Jason Kelce. Jay Biggerstaff-Imagn Images
Meanwhile, Kylie got plaudits for her singing talents alongside Jason and Travis Kelce as the brand new "A Philly Special Christmas Party" album came out overnight.
By comparison, Friday evening's news hit much closer to home. Kylie announced that she is pregnant with their fourth child, a girl, in a sweet Instagram post with a photo of their three other daughters.
"I feel like we captured a very accurate representation of how each of the girls feel about getting another sister," Kelce captioned the expressive photo.
View the original article to see embedded media.
"At least Ellie, mom and dad are on the same page!" she joked.
Their fourth child will be the little sister of Wyatt, 5, Elliotte, 3, and Bennett, 1. The three girls had much different expressions, but wore matching shirts in the announcement photo that said "big sister."
“Kylie has expressed before we started having kids, she wanted a big family. So we’ll see what the future holds,” Jason told Entertainment Tonight in July. “Right now we’ve got our hands full with three of them. So it’s hard to imagine another one running around.”
That same month, Kylie went on social media to publicly quiet pregnancy rumors that had been flying around in the media.
This time, the Kelces made the announcement their way. Their busy lives left no easy time to share the news, but the joy of bringing in a fourth daughter into the world simply couldn't wait any longer.
